---
title: ""
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .blog-hero {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0c2d6b 0%, #1a56db 50%, #3b82f6 100%);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 3rem 2rem;
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .blog-hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: -50%; left: -50%;
    width: 200%; height: 200%;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,255,255,0.05) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 30px 30px;
    animation: drift 20s linear infinite;
  }

  @keyframes drift {
    from { transform: translate(0, 0); }
    to { transform: translate(30px, 30px); }
  }

  @keyframes fadeInUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(25px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  .blog-hero-content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .blog-hero h1 {
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #fff;
    border: none;
    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease-out;
  }

  .blog-hero p {
    color: #bfdbfe;
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease-out 0.2s both;
  }

  .blog-body {
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 2rem;
  }

  .blog-card {
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 2rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(26, 86, 219, 0.08);
    border-left: 4px solid #dbeafe;
    transition: all 0.4s ease;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.7s ease-out both;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .blog-card::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; right: 0;
    width: 80px; height: 80px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, transparent 50%, rgba(26, 86, 219, 0.04) 50%);
    transition: all 0.4s ease;
  }

  .blog-card:hover::after {
    width: 120px; height: 120px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, transparent 50%, rgba(26, 86, 219, 0.08) 50%);
  }

  .blog-card:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
  .blog-card:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.25s; }
  .blog-card:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }

  .blog-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px);
    box-shadow: 0 12px 35px rgba(26, 86, 219, 0.15);
    border-left: 4px solid #1a56db;
  }

  .blog-card h3 {
    color: #1e40af;
    font-size: 1.3rem;
    margin: 0 0 0.3rem 0;
    transition: color 0.3s ease;
  }

  .blog-card:hover h3 { color: #1a56db; }

  .blog-date {
    color: #64748b;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-style: italic;
    margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
    display: block;
  }

  .blog-card p {
    color: #475569;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    line-height: 1.65;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }

  .blog-read-more {
    display: inline-block;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0c2d6b, #1a56db);
    color: #fff !important;
    padding: 0.55rem 1.3rem;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }

  .blog-read-more:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(26, 86, 219, 0.3);
  }

  .tag {
    display: inline-block;
    background-color: #dbeafe;
    color: #1e40af;
    padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
    border-radius: 20px;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    margin-right: 0.4rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
  }

  .tag:hover {
    background-color: #1a56db;
    color: #fff;
    transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.05);
  }
</style>

<!-- Blog Hero -->
<div class="blog-hero">
  <div class="blog-hero-content">
    <h1>Blog</h1>
    <p>Writeups & deep dives on analytics, experimentation, and applied stats</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="blog-body">

  <div class="blog-card">
    <h3>Why You Shouldn't Peek at Your A/B Test</h3>
    <span class="blog-date">April 2026 · UCSD Marketing Analytics</span>
    <p>A first-principles walkthrough of the classical frequentist toolkit through the lens of a simulated A/B test on newsletter sign-up CTAs. Covers the Law of Large Numbers, bootstrap vs. analytical standard errors, the Central Limit Theorem, hypothesis testing, the regression equivalence of the two-sample t-test, and a simulation showing how peeking at results early inflates the false positive rate well beyond the nominal 5%.</p>
    <a href="posts/ab-testing-cta/index.html" class="blog-read-more">Read the full writeup →</a>
    <div>
      <span class="tag">A/B Testing</span><span class="tag">Simulation</span><span class="tag">Bootstrap</span><span class="tag">Hypothesis Testing</span><span class="tag">Python</span><span class="tag">Quarto</span>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```
